g.text: 标题字体：18 pt 粗体

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #3d3d3d

g.text: 副标题字体：10.5 pt 常规

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010
font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010

g.text: 附图标号：编号徽标，放在左上角

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010

g.text: 说明短句：优先用 1-2 行，不写长段落

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010

g.text: 灰度规则：不能只靠颜色，必须靠位置 / 形状 / 线型

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010

g.text: 专利版：去彩色，保留黑白线稿和必要文字

g.text: 推荐页面宽度：单栏可读，灰度打印可分辨

text.style: font-size: 10.2px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #101010

g.text: 禁用：渐变、厚重阴影、3D 拟物、卡通图标
